General
---------------
Background Removal: Unlimited BG (https://unlimitedbg.com/)
UI Elements: Canva (https://www.canva.com/)
Game Engine: Godot Engine (https://godotengine.org/)
Model Editing: Blender 4 (https://www.blender.org/)

Characters (NPCs)
---------------
NPC Model: Tinkercad (https://www.tinkercad.com/)
NPC Modifications: Blender 4 (https://www.blender.org/)
NPC Animation: Mixamo (https://www.mixamo.com/)

User Interface
---------------
UI Design: Canva (https://www.canva.com/)
UI Font(s): Google Fonts (https://fonts.google.com/)

Audio
---------------
Sound Effects: Audacity (https://www.audacityteam.org/)

		- Wall Concrete (Edited): "Concrete" by Saurav72 (https://www.materialmaker.org/materials?tag=59) CC-BY
